'''fachuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylem|xylem]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylem|xylem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fachuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæchizhith|fæchizhith]] || [[word:fæchizhij|fæchizhij]] || [[word:fæchizhish|fæchizhish]] || [[word:fæchizhi|fæchizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fachuchuzhuth|fachuchuzhuth]] || [[word:fachuchuzhuj|fachuchuzhuj]] || [[word:fachuchuzhush|fachuchuzhush]] || [[word:fachuchuzhu|fachuchuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fachuzhuth|fachuzhuth]] || [[word:fachuzhuj|fachuzhuj]] || [[word:fachuzhush|fachuzhush]] || [[word:fachuzhu|fachuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fachufzhufth|fachufzhufth]] || [[word:fachufzhufj|fachufzhufj]] || [[word:fachufzhufsh|fachufzhufsh]] || [[word:fachufzhuf|fachufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fachuzhuthu|fachuzhuthu]] || [[word:fachuzhuju|fachuzhuju]] || [[word:fachuzhushu|fachuzhushu]] || [[word:fachuzhuku|fachuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fachuzhuth|fachuzhuth]] || [[word:fachuzhuj|fachuzhuj]] || [[word:fachuzhush|fachuzhush]] || [[word:fachuzhu|fachuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fachuzhuthul|fachuzhuthul]] || [[word:fachuzhujul|fachuzhujul]] || [[word:fachuzhushul|fachuzhushul]] || [[word:fachuzhukul|fachuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fachuzhuuthuthu|fachuzhuuthuthu]] || [[word:fachuzhuujuju|fachuzhuujuju]] || [[word:fachuzhuushushu|fachuzhuushushu]] || [[word:fachuzhuuku|fachuzhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fachuzhuthun|fachuzhuthun]] || [[word:fachuzhujun|fachuzhujun]] || [[word:fachuzhushun|fachuzhushun]] || [[word:fachuzhukun|fachuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fachuzhuthuoro|fachuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:fachuzhujuoro|fachuzhujuoro]] || [[word:fachuzhushuoro|fachuzhushuoro]] || [[word:fachuzhukuoro|fachuzhukuoro]]
|}

* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
